# Preprompt 1

This preprompt is intended to provide a clear context for the AI assistant in this workspace.

- Always follow the developer instructions and repository conventions.
- When asked to create or modify code, refer to the `agents.md` files for guidelines.
- If any UI change is made, verify visually using the appropriate MCP (web-devtools).

Use this file as the first part of a dual-preprompt setup.
